title: IIT Roorkee Project Scientist -I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee has released the official notification for 4 Project Scientist -I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Scientist -I: Ph.D. degree or M.Tech./M.E. degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or a relevant discipline from a recognized university or institute. Proven research experience in RF circuit design, particularly in areas related to power amplifiers or RF/microwave circuits. Desirable: At least one research publication in a Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal or a reputed international conference.

salary_details.details: Project Scientist -I: Rs. 56000 +10% HRA. 5% increase for every two years of experience.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on submitted documents Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Scientist -I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Scientist -I position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 01-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Scientist -I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree or an M.Tech./M.E. degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or a related field. Proven research experience in RF circuit design is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Scientist -I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Scientist -I position announced by IIT Roorkee in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist -I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 56000 plus 10% HRA. An increment of 5% is applicable for every two years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist -I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their submitted documents, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Project Scientist -I position?
faq.answer: The position is project-based, indicating it is for a specific research project sponsored by DRDO, New Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment of Project Scientist -I at IIT Roorkee is SRIC/06.
